How it is configured: 1 vCPU, 2 GB RAM, 50 GB NVMe SSD. Hosts both the Next.js backend (using PM2/Docker) and your PostgreSQL database.
Keep utilizing R2's free 10 GB. If you exceed it, it is only ₹1.25 per GB.
Keep using Resend's free 3,000 emails/mo. If you scale, Amazon SES is extremely cheap (₹8 per 1,000 emails).
Direct server logging instead of paid Sentry.
